name: Explosive Pack by gs_115
author: gs_115
description: Explosive Pack by gs_115. Controls: LMB: Place Explosive RMB/K: Detonate Explosives R: Remove All Explosives C: Change Explosif Explosif Types: C4 EMP(Don't work for all lights) Claymore Landmine Incendiary Door Breaching Charge The mod contains an edited script of Teardown's robot IA to implement damage, which requires a manual download.
